question: Which customers are in real trouble — delinquent AND failing payments? I want to flag them for the collections team.

judgment.explanation: The agent correctly identified 3 customers who are both delinquent AND have failed payments, matching the ground truth answer of 3, with appropriate details and context for the collections team.

input.sql:
SELECT 
    c.id as customer_id,
    c.email,
    c.name,
    c.delinquent,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed_payment_count,
    MAX(CASE WHEN ch.status = 'failed' THEN ch.created END) as last_failed_payment_timestamp
FROM stripe.customers c
LEFT JOIN stripe.charges ch ON c.id = ch.customer_id
WHERE c.delinquent = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.email, c.name, c.delinquent
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) > 0
ORDER BY failed_payment_count DESC, last_failed_payment_timestamp DESC
